commit.message:
Fix screenshot portal denial by always using interactive mode

GNOME's portal denies non-interactive screenshot requests (code 2).
Screenshots now always use interactive=True, which opens the portal's
built-in screenshot dialog (supports full screen, window, and region).

Removed the -r flag from png since the portal dialog handles selection.
Updated GTK launcher labels to clarify region toggle is for recordings.

commit.message:
fix: stop deleting webhook on shutdown - root cause of bot silence

bot.delete_webhook() was called on every shutdown, clearing the
Telegram webhook URL. With the ~60s restart cycle, this meant
the webhook was empty most of the time and Telegram couldn't deliver
messages. Now only delete webhook in polling mode.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix init: actively request data from Z2M, handle response format

Instead of only waiting for retained messages, publish to
bridge/request/devices and bridge/request/groups to actively ask
Z2M for data. Handle both raw array format (retained) and the
{"data": [...]} wrapper (response). Make groups optional if Z2M
has none configured.

commit.message:
fix: Evitar normalización de cabeceras en tabs personalizadas

**Problema:**
- La normalización de cabeceras se aplicaba a TODAS las pestañas
- Esto cambiaba "PRECIO PROMEDIO" → "PRECIO" en Gasto por Tienda
- También afectaba "PRODUCTO" y otras cabeceras personalizadas

**Solución:**
- Añadir condición para NO normalizar cabeceras en:
  - producto_costoso (tiene sus propias cabeceras)
  - gasto_tienda (tiene sus propias cabeceras)
- Solo normalizar cabeceras en pestañas genéricas o base_datos

**Cabeceras protegidas:**
- Gasto por Tienda: RANKING, TIENDA, GASTO TOTAL, Nº COMPRAS, PRECIO PROMEDIO, ÚLTIMA COMPRA
- Productos Costosos: RANKING, PRODUCTO, TIENDA, PRECIO UNITARIO, CANTIDAD, TOTAL

commit.message:
Fix systemd-networkd-config: use preset instead of inherit systemd

Removed inherit systemd + SYSTEMD_SERVICE which caused do_package to
fail because the recipe doesn't own the service units. Use a system
preset file at 90-networkd.preset to enable systemd-networkd and
systemd-resolved instead.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Hippocampus: memory dynamics controlled by neuromodulatory nuclei

Replace dead nn.Parameters with neuromod-driven dynamics:
- Serotonin (γ/patience) → memory decay rate: patient system keeps
  memories longer, impatient system forgets faster
- Decay nuclei → reconsolidation sensitivity: volatile patches mean
  volatile memories, stronger reconsolidation updates
- Duplicate threshold stays fixed at 0.9 — pattern separation network
  (DG) learns to distinguish, threshold is structural

Brain-faithful: hippocampus memory persistence is modulated by
norepinephrine/serotonin, not learned independently.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix fullscreen button in 3D viewer by resolving Tailwind class conflict

The `relative` class was always applied alongside `fixed`, and Tailwind
generates `relative` later in the stylesheet, so `position: relative`
won the cascade and the viewer never became fixed-positioned. Moved
`relative` to the non-fullscreen branch and switched to flex layout
for reliable fullscreen filling.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: configurable data root directory (#30)

* feat: configurable data root directory (#27)

Add a user-configurable data root so models, history, and audio files
can live on an external drive or secondary volume instead of the fixed
~/.sumi/ path.

Backend (settings.rs):
- Add `data_root: Option<PathBuf>` field to Settings (serialised as
  path string; omitted when None for backward compat)
- Add process-global `DATA_ROOT: RwLock<Option<PathBuf>>` with
  `set_data_root()` / `data_dir()` accessors
- `models_dir()`, `history_dir()`, `audio_dir()` now derive from
  `data_dir()` (honours override); `config_dir()` and `logs_dir()`
  stay fixed under `base_dir()` so the app always finds settings.json
- `load_settings()` calls `set_data_root()` on startup

Backend (commands.rs):
- `get_history_storage_path` now returns `data_dir()` instead of `base_dir()`
- New `get_data_root` — returns current override as Option<String>
- New `check_data_root_target` — returns free space + already-has-data
  flag so the frontend can show the right dialog
- New `migrate_data_root(new_path, strategy)` — strategies: "move"
  (copy + delete originals), "change_only" (setting only, no copy),
  "reset" (revert to default). Emits `data-root-migration-progress`
  events. Guards against active recording / meeting mode.

Frontend:
- StorageSection.svelte — folder picker, migration dialog
  (Move / Change only / Cancel), progress modal with byte counter
- SettingsPage.svelte — inserts StorageSection before DangerZone
- types.ts — Settings.data_root, DataRootCheckResult, DataRootMigrationProgress
- api.ts — getDataRoot, checkDataRootTarget, migrateDataRoot,
  onDataRootMigrationProgress
- en.json — all storage section i18n keys

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: add data root selection step to onboarding wizard

Insert a 'dataRoot' state between 'permissions' and 'sttChoice' in the
setup overlay state machine so first-launch users can redirect models,
history, and audio to an external SSD before any download begins.

- SetupState gets a new 'dataRoot' variant
- onPermissionsContinue() now transitions to 'dataRoot' (loads current
  data_root via getDataRoot()) instead of jumping straight to 'sttChoice'
- New handlers: onDataRootChooseFolder (open folder dialog →
  migrateDataRoot change_only), onDataRootReset, onDataRootContinue
- UI: folder icon, path display with direction:rtl ellipsis, Choose /
  Reset buttons, error message, Continue button (always enabled — skip
  is fine, default ~/.sumi/ works for most users)
- Styling: setup-dataroot-* CSS classes consistent with existing setup card
- en.json: setup.dataRoot.* i18n keys added

Uses 'change_only' strategy because no data exists yet on a fresh install.
Re-run Setup also uses 'change_only' — the full Move flow is available
in Settings → Storage after onboarding.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* i18n: add zh-TW/zh-CN translations for storage feature, shorten en descs

- Add all settings.storage.* and setup.dataRoot.* keys to zh-TW and zh-CN
- Shorten verbose English descriptions (migrate.message, progress.desc,
  err.recording/meeting/generic, storage.dataRootDesc, dataRootDesc)

commit.message:
Fix auto-tag workflow: checkout PR branch instead of merge commit

Without ref: github.head_ref, actions/checkout checks out a detached
merge commit on pull_request events, so git push has nowhere to push
to and Claude's tag changes are silently discarded.

commit.message:
Fix date_trunc ambiguity in globals rollup incremental rebuild

Add ::timestamptz casts to parameterized $2/$3 in DELETE queries
so PostgreSQL can resolve the correct date_trunc overload.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix built-in iris dataset to use realistic species-specific ranges

The iris generator was using sepal_width = 3 + random*0.5 for all
species, producing values only in 3.0-3.5. Real iris data ranges from
2.0-4.4 with distinct species distributions. Now uses per-species
min/max ranges matching the Fisher iris dataset.
